title: Decision No. 48 of 2022 Regarding the Rights of Data Subjects
summary: Clarifies procedures and controller obligations for exercising rights under the Personal Data Protection Law, including objections or requests relating to automated processing decisions that may be produced by AI systems.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.ai_governance_ethics: Implements data subject rights including automated-processing decision rights.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Implements data subject rights including automated-processing rights.

notes: Related instruments: Amended by Decision No. 80 of 2025 and implements Law No. 30 of 2018
